summary: Testing iteration 156 - Publish Draft bug fix verification. Backend publish endpoint POST /api/admin/site/content-layout/revisions/{draft_id}/publish now works correctly. The publish guard no longer blocks unknown/inactive component definitions (only deprecated keys are blocked). Frontend error display shows readable error messages from backend.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend fix correctly implemented: _validate_publish_guard_or_400 only blocks deprecated keys (category.navigator, layout.category-navigator-side, etc.) but allows unknown/inactive components
Frontend fix correctly implemented: extractBuilderApiErrorText and normalizeBuilderErrorText properly extract and display error details including blocked_keys

success_rate.frontend: UI loads correctly, publish button visible

context_for_next_testing_agent: Publish draft bug has been fixed. The _validate_publish_guard_or_400 function now only blocks deprecated component keys (listed in PUBLISH_GUARD_BLOCKED_COMPONENT_KEYS tuple). Unknown/inactive component definitions are allowed to be published. Frontend shows readable error messages when publish fails. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_publish_draft.py can be used for regression testing.

verified_fixes.backend_publish_guard: Verified: Drafts with unknown component keys like 'totally.unknown.component.test123' can now be published successfully (returns ok=true)
verified_fixes.backend_blocked_keys: Verified: Drafts with deprecated keys like 'category.navigator' are still correctly blocked with error code 'publish_guard_blocked_components'
verified_fixes.frontend_error_display: Verified: extractBuilderApiErrorText properly formats error objects including code and blocked_keys fields
